label: Seam-Quiet Berth
description: Seam-Quiet Berth serves as a compact sleeping chamber carved from the Prismworn Cask’s basalt-glass vault, its surfaces dulled by electrostatically pinned glass dust. A recessed alcove holds a low sleeping platform beneath darkened crystal slats that filter the tavern’s prism-light into measured, copper-white bands. Mirror-slag filaments set into the floor continue the escarpment’s seam-line tracery, maintaining a strict alignment to Seamline Concord’s auroral sightlines. Cistern-fed condensers keep the air mineral-clean, leaving a cool metallic brightness on the bedding rails and wall fittings.
